page_content:
Formerly: FILM410.

SLLC411 Experimental Film (3 Credits)

Introductory survey of European and U.S. American experimental cinema.

Cross-listed with: CINE411. Credit Only Granted for: SLLC411, CINE411 or FILM411. Formerly: FILM411.

SLLC461 Political Cinema (3 Credits)

Histories of cinema and politics in the 20th century.

Prerequisite: ENGL245, FILM245, or CINE245; or permission of ARHU- School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department. Cross-listed with: CINE461.
